achievements.description: Shoot Koopa the Quick 5 times in a single race in Bob-Omb Battlefield

achievements.description: Destroy both of the Thwomps in Whomp's Fortress

achievements.description: Shoot a Baby Penguin in Cool, Cool Mountain and get punished

achievements.description: Destroy the Mad Piano in Big Boo's Haunt

achievements.description: Successfully stop the Merry-Go-Round in Big Boo's Haunt

achievements.title: Unleashing the Ancient Curse
achievements.description: Break the Pyramid top by shooting it in Shifting Sand Land

achievements.title: Dooming the Kingdom
achievements.description: Complete the Tutorial without being out of zoomed in mario cam for a second

achievements.title: Starting with a Quake
achievements.description: Skip the Tutorial with the special button combo
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Dethroning the King
achievements.description: Defeat King Bob-Omb in Bob-Omb Battlefield without grabbing him directly
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.description: Defeat King Whomp in Whomp's Fortress without pressing A, B or Z
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Stone Handed Menace
achievements.description: Defeat Eyerok in Shifting Sand Land in only 2 shots and hitting each hand once without pressing A or B
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Swarm of the Century
achievements.description: Defeat Wiggler in Tiny-Huge Island while only standing on the green platform
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Flying Like a Falcon
achievements.description: Collect the 100 Coin Star in Bob-Omb Battlefield without pressing A
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Wooden Will
achievements.description: Collect "Fall Onto the Caged Island" in Whomp's Fortress from the wooden pillar
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Stone Cold Sprint
achievements.description: Collect "Blast Away the Wall" in Whomp's Fortress using only the FPS camera and in under 20 Seconds
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Ye Scallywag, Get Back Here Yer Thief!
achievements.description: Collect "Plunder in the Sunken Ship" in Jolly Roger Bay without lowering the water
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Extracting the Sunken Treasure
achievements.description: Collect "Red Coins on the Ship Afloat" in Jolly Roger Bay without pressing A
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Melting the Ice Caps
achievements.description: Collect "Wall Kicks will Work" in Cool, Cool Mountain while holding a baby penguin
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Breaking Boo's Curse
achievements.description: Collect "Big Boo's Balcony" in Big Boo's Haunt without using a single door or entering the Mansion
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: This is It, The Apocalypse
achievements.description: Collect the 100 Coin Star in Hazy Maze Cave without pressing A
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Burning Passion
achievements.description: Collect "Hot-Foot in the Volcano" in Lethal Lava Land starting a longjump past the second pole for "Elevator Tour in the Volcano" without touching the ground
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Defrosting Heights
achievements.description: Collect "In the Deep Freeze" in Snowman's Land by longjumping from the snowman's head
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Swimming in the Abandoned City
achievements.description: Collect "Go to Town for Red Coins" in Wet-Dry World without lowering the town's water
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Breaking Ukiki's Treasure
achievements.description: Collect "Secret of the Monkey Cage" in Tall, Tall Mountain while holding the Ukiki at the top without dropping him
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Never Surrender. Never Fall
achievements.description: Starting from the wooden line at the first longjump in Tall, Tall Mountain, scale the mountain vertically in under 18 seconds
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Arduous Mountain Climber
achievements.description: Collect "The Tip Top of the Huge Island" in Tiny-Huge Island without pressing A once or entering the tiny island
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Ticking Time Bomb
achievements.description: Collect "Roll Into the Cage" in Tick Tock Clock on the random setting without pressing A
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Robbery in the Skylines
achievements.description: Collect "Big House in the Sky" in Rainbow Ride without using a Carpet, Warp and only using the FPS camera
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Wear Your Pride
achievements.description: Collect "Swinging in the Breeze" in Rainbow Ride starting a longjump from the closest blue block to the maze without touching the ground
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Busting Bowser's Doors
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser in "Bowser in the Dark World" with 30 or more coins without taking damage, using only the FPS camera
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Gold Medalist
achievements.description: From the star platform in Bowser in the Fire Sea, longjump to the beginning of the third floor
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Sliding Sharpshooter
achievements.description: Collect the Box Star in Princess Peach's Secret Slide without pressing A
achievements.author: LilCutieSophia

achievements.title: Vanishing into the Void
achievements.description: Collect the Red Coin Star in Vanish Cap under the Moat without pressing A
